title: Felix and the Great Sock Mystery
synopsis: When Felix's favorite dinosaur socks go missing on laundry day, he embarks on a silly adventure through his house to solve the mystery, discovering that his baby sister Maya has been collecting socks for her own special purpose.

pages.text: Felix loved his dinosaur socks. They were green with tiny T-Rex prints all over them. Every morning, he would wiggle his toes and roar like a dinosaur. "ROAR! I am Felix the T-Rex!" he would say. But this morning was different. Felix looked in his sock drawer. No dinosaur socks! "Where are my socks?" Felix asked.

illustration.description: Felix, a cheerful 6-year-old boy with curly brown hair and bright brown eyes, stands in his colorful bedroom looking puzzled. He's wearing pajamas and holding an empty sock drawer open. His room has toy dinosaurs scattered around and superhero posters on the walls. The morning sunlight streams through the window creating warm golden tones.
illustration.alt: Felix looking confused while searching through his empty sock drawer in his bedroom

pages.text: "Mom!" Felix called. "My dinosaur socks are gone!" Mom came into his room. She had dark skin and wore a bright yellow apron. "Oh no!" she said. "Maybe they're in the laundry room. Let's go look together." Felix and Mom walked down the hall. Their cat, Whiskers, followed them. Whiskers was orange and fluffy.

illustration.description: Felix walking down a bright hallway with his mom, who has beautiful dark skin, natural hair in a bun, and is wearing a cheerful yellow apron. An adorable orange tabby cat named Whiskers trots alongside them. The hallway has family photos on the walls showing diverse family members, and warm lighting creates a cozy home atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Felix, his mom, and their orange cat walking down the hallway together

pages.text: In the laundry room, they looked everywhere. They checked the washing machine. Empty! They checked the dryer. No socks! They looked in the laundry basket. Just Dad's big shirts and Mom's colorful scarves. "This is a mystery," said Mom. "You're right," said Felix. "I need to find my socks!" Whiskers meowed as if he wanted to help too.

illustration.description: Felix and his mom searching through a busy laundry room with a front-loading washer and dryer. Mom is holding up a colorful scarf while Felix peers into the empty dryer. Whiskers sits nearby with his tail swishing. The room has shelves with detergent bottles and folded clothes in rainbow colors, creating a vibrant, lived-in feeling.
illustration.alt: Felix and mom searching for the missing socks in the laundry room while their cat watches

pages.text: Felix decided to search the whole house. "I'm going on a sock adventure!" he announced. First, he looked under his bed. He found toy cars, a puzzle piece, and dust bunnies. But no dinosaur socks. Next, he checked the living room. Dad was reading a book on the couch. Dad had glasses and a big smile. "Have you seen my dinosaur socks, Dad?" "Not today," said Dad. "But good luck, Detective Felix!"

illustration.description: Felix crawling under his bed with a flashlight, his bottom sticking out comically. Dust bunnies and colorful toys are scattered around. In the background, his dad sits on a comfy couch reading a book - dad has kind eyes behind wire-rimmed glasses and a warm smile. The living room has plants, family photos, and cozy lighting.
illustration.alt: Felix searching under his bed while dad reads on the couch in the background

pages.text: Felix looked in the kitchen. His big sister Zara was eating cereal. Zara had long black braids with colorful beads. "Zara, did you see my dinosaur socks?" Felix asked. "Nope," said Zara. "But I saw Maya crawling around earlier with something green." Maya was Felix's baby sister. She was only one year old. "That's a clue!" said Felix. He felt like a real detective now.

illustration.description: Felix talking to his older sister Zara in a bright, modern kitchen. Zara has beautiful long black braids decorated with colorful beads and is eating from a bowl of cereal. She points thoughtfully while talking. The kitchen has plants on the windowsill, colorful artwork on the fridge, and morning sunlight streaming in, creating a warm family atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Felix talking to his sister Zara in the kitchen as she eats breakfast

pages.text: Felix followed the clue to Maya's room. Maya was sitting on the floor, playing with blocks. She had curly hair like Felix and big brown eyes. She looked up and giggled when she saw Felix. "Maya," said Felix, "do you know where my socks are?" Maya pointed to her toy box and said, "Gah gah!" Felix didn't speak baby talk very well. But he understood that Maya wanted to show him something.

illustration.description: Baby Maya sitting on a soft rug in her nursery, surrounded by colorful building blocks. She has adorable curly hair and big expressive brown eyes, giggling and pointing toward her toy box. Felix kneels beside her looking curious. The nursery has soft pastel colors, stuffed animals, and a mobile hanging above, creating a gentle, playful mood.
illustration.alt: Felix kneeling next to baby Maya in her nursery as she points to her toy box

pages.text: Felix opened Maya's toy box. Inside, he found something amazing! Not just his dinosaur socks, but lots of socks! There were Dad's blue socks, Mom's fuzzy pink socks, and Zara's striped socks. "Maya!" said Felix. "You collected all our socks!" Maya clapped her hands and laughed. "Gah gah!" she said happily. Felix laughed too. His baby sister was very sneaky!

illustration.description: Felix opening a large, colorful toy box overflowing with socks of all patterns and colors - striped, polka-dotted, fuzzy, and his beloved green dinosaur socks on top. Maya sits nearby clapping her hands with pure joy, her eyes sparkling with mischief. The room is filled with warm light and the socks create a rainbow of colors spilling from the box.
illustration.alt: Felix discovering all the missing socks in Maya's toy box while she claps happily

pages.text: "Why did you take all the socks?" Felix asked Maya. Maya crawled to her dollhouse and pointed inside. Felix looked carefully. Maya had used the socks as blankets for all her toy animals! There was a teddy bear covered with Dad's blue sock. A toy elephant had Mom's pink sock as a blanket. "You made blankets!" said Felix. "That's so smart, Maya!"

illustration.description: A charming dollhouse scene where various stuffed animals and toys are tucked in with different patterned socks as blankets. A teddy bear sleeps under a blue sock, a toy elephant under a pink fuzzy sock, and other animals cozy under striped and colorful socks. Maya and Felix look on with wonder and delight at this creative display.
illustration.alt: Maya's dollhouse with toy animals covered by socks used as blankets

pages.text: Felix put on his dinosaur socks and wiggled his toes. "ROAR! I'm Felix the T-Rex!" he said. Maya giggled and tried to roar too. "Gah gah ROAR!" The whole family came to see what was happening. "Maya was keeping our socks safe," Felix explained. "She made blankets for her toys!" Everyone laughed. Mom gave Maya extra baby socks for her toy animals. Now everyone was happy, and Felix had his dinosaur socks back!

illustration.description: The whole family gathered in Maya's room, all smiling and laughing together. Felix proudly wears his green dinosaur socks and is roaring playfully while Maya attempts her own little roar. Mom, Dad, and Zara are all laughing warmly. The room glows with golden light and the family's joy and love fills the space with warmth and happiness.
illustration.alt: The whole family laughing together in Maya's room with Felix wearing his dinosaur socks

metadata.illustrationStyle: Playful storybook illustration style. Rich saturated colors. Expressive characters with big eyes. Whimsical, like Pixar concept art.

questions.question: What kind of socks was Felix looking for?
questions.explanation: Felix was looking for his green dinosaur socks with T-Rex prints that he loved to wear.

questions.question: Who gave Felix the important clue about something green?
questions.explanation: Zara told Felix that she saw baby Maya crawling around with something green earlier.

questions.question: Where did Felix find all the missing socks?
questions.explanation: Felix found all the family's socks hidden in Maya's toy box.

questions.question: What was Maya using the socks for?
questions.explanation: Maya was using all the different socks as blankets to cover her toy animals in the dollhouse.

questions.question: How did the story end?
choices: Everyone was happy and Maya got baby socks for her toys
questions.explanation: The family was happy when they understood what Maya was doing, and Mom gave her baby socks so she could keep making blankets for her toys.

pages.title: Complete the Story
pages.instructions: Fill in the missing words to complete the sentences from the story.

sentences.text: Felix loved his _____ socks with tiny T-Rex prints.
Maya was using the socks as _____ for her toy animals.
_____ gave Felix the clue about seeing something green.

pages.title: What Happens Next?
pages.instructions: Put these events in the right order by choosing what happened first, second, and third.

sentences.text: First, Felix _____ in his sock drawer.
Then, he _____ around the house for clues.
Finally, he _____ all the socks in Maya's toy box.
